propose_next_subaxis: NEXT: "{axis}" applies to {industries} — ask which {axis_lower}(s) via ask_question using these options: {options}; then propose_tags(category `{axis_key}`). After that, call scope_options for objectives and features to get vocabulary tailored to this selection.
remove_missing: Not on the board (nothing to remove): {values}.
finalize_missing: Not ready to finalize — the profile still needs: {missing}. Ask the user about each of these, propose_tags for them, and only call finalize_setup once every required section has at least one tag.
lookup: {name} ({ecosystem}): verdict={verdict}, lastRelease={last_release} — DECIDE NEXT: add it with propose_tags (category `libraries`) or drop it with dismiss_item.
consider: Noted {n} option(s) under consideration: {items}. Decide on EACH before moving on — propose_tags to add it, or dismiss_item to skip it (with a reason). Ask the user with ask_question if you are unsure which to keep.
dismiss: Dismissed {name} ({reason}) — it will not be added.
image_generated: Generated the image and showed it to the user. You can refine it with edit_image.
image_edited: Edited the image and showed the updated version to the user.
board_state_header: BOARD STATE (the source of truth — do NOT re-ask what is already chosen; build on it):
nudge_continue: Continue: take the next step now — ask the next question or call the needed tool.
nudge_record: You have NOT recorded the user's last answer ({sel}). Call propose_tags NOW to save those under the matching category, then continue with the next topic — do not stop until their selections are on the board.
nudge_ask_tool: To collect the user's answer, ask that question with the `ask_question` tool now (question + options, multi:true) — it shows tappable buttons the user can answer.
nudge_reconcile: Before you stop: you were weighing {items} but have not decided on {it_them}. For EACH, either call propose_tags to add it or dismiss_item to skip it with a reason. If you are unsure which to keep, ask the user with ask_question first.
loop_warn: Loop guard: you already called `{tool}` with these exact arguments and got the same result. Do not repeat it — take a different action or finish your reply.
loop_block: Loop guard: `{tool}` was called repeatedly with identical arguments and is stuck in a loop, so this call was NOT executed. Choose a different action or finalize now.
stories_drafted: Drafted {n} user {plural} (rephrased + nested into a tree){parent}. Check the shape with list_user_stories; fix any nesting with move_user_story if needed.
task_updated: Updated task "{title}". Changes are live in the UI.
